public_results.description: Public registry of the four main 194M runs, selected dense baselines, and selected ablation checkpoints used to preserve the historical DualPath experimental narrative.

expected_properties.historical_scope: 194M main study plus selected baselines and ablations

public_results.description: Public 0.8B checkpoint generation smoke test on the released checkpoint and tokenizer.
Minimal training-loop smoke test using the built-in smoke dataset and a tiny model configuration.

expected_properties.ephemeral_output: artifacts/tmp_train_smoke is regenerated locally and is not included in the release package

non_public_paper_results.description: Main pre-training and held-out evaluation tables tied to the original non-public corpus mixture and shard layout.
non_public_paper_results.reason: Raw data, source-level manifest, and validation shard mapping are not public.

non_public_paper_results.description: Reconstruction of the older DualPath-style public repository layout with all historical checkpoints, eval scripts, and raw result folders exactly as originally described.
non_public_paper_results.reason: The current release intentionally keeps one unified public root to avoid version drift and reproducibility mismatches.

non_public_paper_results.description: Exact reconstruction of the training corpus composition at the source level.
non_public_paper_results.reason: The release exposes only aggregate-domain protocol information, not source-level identifiers.
